meta.title: Assets | TUF
meta.description: Catalog view of all assets (tags, difficulties, curation types), SVG icons, and static files from components/common/icons and src/assets on The Universal Forums.

header.title: Assets
header.lede: Catalog view of all assets (tags, difficulties, curation types) plus all svg icons and static files from under components/common/icons and src/assets.

tags.title: Level tags
tags.hint: Loaded from the difficulties service `/tags` endpoint (same data as the rest of the site).

difficulties.title: Difficulty icons
difficulties.hint: All difficulty rows from context, ordered by `sortOrder`. Icons use the `original` CDN size. Use the switch to hide or show rows whose `type` is `LEGACY`.

curationTypes.title: Curation types
curationTypes.hint: Curation type catalog used on level pages and creator profiles.

staticAssets.title: Static assets (`src/assets`)
staticAssets.hint: Image and font files discovered by Vite glob. Resolved URLs are suitable for copying into code or docs. Font files show a placeholder tile.

filter.label: Filter
filter.placeholderTags: Search by group or tag name…
filter.noMatches: No items match the current filters.
